TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: pslkotas babaw kmnloh 'bagan lga, pslkotas qu qalang Tayal la. msli kuwara qu qutux niqan, qmasuw pcyuwagun, psqqas grhuw ryax. tehuk ryax lga, msqun tegalu ki mlawa Utux Wagiq ru utux bnkis, msqun mquwas ru mzyugi smqqas ki mplaw maniq. pslkotas hya ga psqutux inlungan qalang ki 'mubuy psglabang gaga Tayal.
S.PHON: ps~…ēlkotas~…ē ő≤aő≤aw kmnlońß Ēő≤a…£an l…£a, ps~…ēlkotas~…ē qu qalaŇč tajal la. ms~…ēli kuwara qu qutux niqan, qmas~…ēuw p ¶~ ®juwa…£un, ps~…ēqqas~…ē …£rńßuw rjax. teńßuk rjax l…£a, ms~…ēqun te…£alu ki mlawa utux wa…£iq ru utux ő≤nkis~…ē, ms~…ēqun mquwas~…ē ru mzju…£i s~…ēmqqas~…ē ki mplaw maniq. ps~…ēlkotas~…ē ńßja …£a ps~…ēqutux inluŇčan qalaŇč ki Ēmuő≤uj ps~…ē…£laő≤aŇč …£a…£a tajal.
S.FORM: pslkotas babaw kmnloh 'bagan lga, pslkotas qu qalang Tayal la. msli kuwara qu qutux niqan, qmasuw pcyuwagun, psqqas grhuw ryax. tehuk ryax lga, msqun tegalu ki mlawa Utux Wagiq ru utux bnkis, msqun mquwas ru mzyugi smqqas ki mplaw maniq. pslkotas hya ga psqutux inlungan qalang ki 'mubuy psglabang gaga Tayal.
